title: alchemilla gracilis f. adpressepilosa
intro: Alchemilla gracilis f. adpressepilosa, also known as a variety of the alpine lady's mantle plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Alchemilla gracilis f. adpressepilosa include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Alchemilla gracilis f. adpressepilosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
